description: Create a two-column content slide on optimism for 2025 with survey question text on the left and a horizontal stacked bar chart by market on the right showing agree vs disagree plus change vs 2023.

header.headline: I am optimistic that 2025 will be a better year for me than it was in 2024
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

left.body:
Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

I am optimistic that 2025 will be a better year for me than it was in 2024

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
